name: Term Limits Do Not Apply to the Void
text:
Whenever an opponent's commander, Mayor, or incumbent would enter the battlefield from anywhere, that player must first win a coin flip you call. If they lose the call, the permanent is exiled and they put two doom counters on the Doomsday Clock instead. You cannot run for office after the office is gone.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if no opponent controls a legendary creature, you win... eventually. You take an extra turn after this one and the table sighs.
flavorText: The campaign promise was simple: there will be no more campaigns.

extras.interaction: hoses rival commanders / the Mayor / incumbents
